adminRunningAsUserNotification.body:
The RSpace system administrator ({0}) has recently logged into your RSpace account.

There are several reasons why this might happen:

  • To perform an admin function
  • Maintenance work
  • User assistance or fault diagnosis

If this is unexpected, or your account has been tampered with, please contact the RSpace admin at {1}.

Best wishes,
RSpace admin
adminRunningAsUserNotification.subject: RSpace admin is using your account
